---
title: "People & Society"
title-block-banner: "#7A263A"
title-block-banner-color: "#F7F4EE"
body-classes: area-people
---

![](../visual_assets/brand/botanical/solid/leaf-display-maroon.svg){.overview-leaf fig-alt="The Canada Observatory leaf in the People & Society colour"}

How many people live in Canada and why that's changing, who they are, and how safe their communities feel — with maps that reach down to the neighbourhood level.

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Population & Growth](index.qmd)
Totals and growth, the components of change, non-permanent residents, the ageing
population, and migration between provinces.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Diversity](diversity.qmd)
Visible-minority and population-group composition over time and mapped to the
census tract, with per-metro neighbourhood detail.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Religion](religion.qmd)
Religious affiliation from 1871 to today — the long-run shift, and the 2021
picture mapped down to the neighbourhood.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Languages](languages.qmd)
The languages spoken at home across Canada's cities, mapped to the census tract.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Citizenship](citizenship.qmd)
Canadian-born, naturalized, and non-citizens by neighbourhood — plus federal
voter turnout over time.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Commuting](commuting.qmd)
How Canadians get to work and how long it takes, by city (2021 Census).
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-people width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-people.svg){.area-banner}

### [Crime & Safety](../wellbeing/crime-safety.qmd)
Long-run severity and homicide, everyday-crime trends, hate crime, clearance
rates, and city and neighbourhood maps.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column width="32%"}
:::

::::
